src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Exclude Spring Security auto-configuration to prevent startup failures due to missing security dependencies or configuration conflicts in the updated environment.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: Application fails to start with a BeanCreationException or NoSuchMethodError if Spring Security auto-configuration is active but required dependencies or beans are missing/changed in the target JDK/Spring Boot version.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Replace deprecated Zeebe Spring Client annotation with the new standard annotation to maintain compatibility with updated library versions.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: Compilation error because the class io.camunda.zeebe.spring.client.annotation.ZeebeDeployment has been removed or renamed in the newer Zeebe Spring Client library.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Update import statement to match the renamed Zeebe deployment annotation class.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol for the old import path io.camunda.zeebe.spring.client.annotation.ZeebeDeployment.

Add import for Spring Context Bean annotation used in the new method.
Replace field injection with constructor or setter injection pattern by switching to @Value annotation for configuration property.

Simplify endpoint registration by using the direct configuration property instead of fetching it from a bean.
Inject HttpServletRequest as a field to replace the manual retrieval from RequestContextHolder.
Remove the helper method that retrieved HttpServletRequest from the current request context.

Add Keycloak configuration property injection to support conditional authentication logic.
Inject KeycloakService to enable Keycloak-specific user retrieval.
Add helper method to check if Keycloak authentication is enabled.
Add method to retrieve authenticated username, supporting both Keycloak and JWT authentication strategies.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.after: protected String getAuthenticatedUsername() { if (isKeycloakAuth()) { return keycloakService.getUsername(request); } UserPrincipal jwtUser = SecurityUtils.getConnectedUser(); return jwtUser.getUsername(); }

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Remove the allowFrames method which was likely unused or superseded by other security configurations.
Refactor AuthenticationController to extend AbstractController and inject services for full authentication logic.
Replace legacy java.io.File list with java.nio.file.Path-based storage to align with modern Java I/O practices.
Introduce a dedicated DTO (FileHolder) to encapsulate file metadata instead of returning a raw Map.

Implement a new endpoint to serve uploaded files as HTTP responses with proper headers.
Update import to use the new package location for the Form DTO class.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: The class Form was moved from the dto package to the jsonmodel package, causing a compile error if the old import is kept.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Replace TaskListService with BpmnService and InternationalizationService to support new form retrieval and translation logic.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: TaskListService is removed or deprecated in favor of BpmnService for embedded forms and InternationalizationService for locale support; using the old service would cause compile errors or missing functionality.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Add import for OperateException to handle exceptions thrown by the new BpmnService.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: The new BpmnService methods throw OperateException, which must be imported and declared in the method signature to compile.
